record.field: Post HR Notification — Outside Location Check-out

for record in records: employee = record.employee_id check_out_time = record.check_out if check_out_time: # Format in the employee's timezone if available import pytz tz_name = (employee and employee.tz) or 'UTC' try: tz = pytz.timezone(tz_name) except Exception: tz = pytz.utc local_time = pytz.utc.localize(check_out_time).astimezone(tz) time_str = local_time.strftime('%d %b %Y at %I:%M %p') else: time_str = 'unknown time' body = ( '

' '⚠ Outside Location Check-out
' 'Employee %s checked out at %s ' 'from a location outside their designated work location.
' 'Please review this attendance record.' '

' ) % (employee.name, time_str) record.message_post( body=body, message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_note', author_id=env.ref('base.user_root').partner_id.id, )
Attendance: Notify HR on Outside-Location Check-out
